news.headline: Altisource closes exchange transaction for term loans with 100% lenders, secures $12.5M super senior credit facility.
news.summary: Altisource Portfolio Solutions S.A. announced on February 20, 2025, the successful completion of an exchange transaction with all lenders under its senior secured term loans, totaling a transaction with a value of $12.5 million through a super senior credit facility. Altisource is a leading provider and marketplace in the real estate and mortgage industries. This transaction, referred to as the Term Loan Exchange Transactions, involved all 100% of the lenders associated with the Company.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: The US is ready for a ramp-up or wind-down of Russia sanctions
Dow Jones futures drop as Walmart tumbles on earnings, while Alibaba jumps. Palantir, Axon, and Cava also saw declines.
news.summary: Stock futures experienced a decline, with Walmart seeing a significant drop in early trading due to disappointing earnings, while Alibaba surged. On Wednesday, companies like Palantir, Axon, and Cava also faced a decrease in their stock prices. The Dow Jones futures fell as Walmart tumbled, but on the positive side, Alibaba's stock made a big jump following the declines of Palantir, Axon, and Cava.

news.headline: President Trump ends U.S. penny production in a historic move due to high minting costs exceeding coin value after 233 years.
news.summary: In a landmark move, President Donald Trump from the United States has made the decision to cease the production of pennies after a long-standing 233-year history. This decision comes as a result of economic considerations as the expenses related to minting surpass the actual value of the coin. This change has significant implications not only on the country's monetary system but also on its history and heritage.

news.headline: PAN Global is progressing with a multi-target drill program in Southern Spain. 6 drillholes completed, new targets found, assays awaited. Drilling to start in two weeks. TSXV: PGZ | OTCQX: PGZFF | FRA: 2EU.
news.summary: PGZ, listed on TSXV and OTCQX as PGZFF and FRA as 2EU, has finished an IP survey at Bravo target. Drilling is set to begin in two weeks, with six drillholes already completed at Escacena. These holes include new targets and step-out holes at La Romana discovery. Assay results are pending. Numerous geophysical targets at Escacena are yet to be explored.

news.headline: Stocks to watch: Walmart, Dropbox; Expected earnings: Dropbox ($0.62/share, $638.91M revenue); Dropbox shares fell 1.8% to $32.67.
news.summary: This morning, U.S. stock futures are down, drawing attention to specific stocks for investors. Dropbox, Inc. (NASDAQ:DBX) is expected to announce quarterly earnings of 62 cents per share with revenue hitting $638.91 million post-market close. On Wednesday, Dropbox shares saw a 1.8% decline, closing at $32.67. Analysts are also closely watching Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG) for updates. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Alight, Inc. appoints Russ Fradin as Chairman of the Board, replacing William Foley on March 1, 2025. New directors added.
news.summary: Alight, Inc. (NYSE: ALIT), a prominent human capital and technology services provider, has named Russell (Russ) P. Fradin as the new Chairman of the Board of Directors, taking over from William P. Foley, II, who will remain a board member. These changes are set to be effective starting from March 1, 2025. The appointments of Robert (Rob) Schriesheim, Robert (Bob) Lopes, Jr., and Mike Hayes to the board have also been confirmed.

news.headline: France's Buy Now Pay Later market to reach $12.68 billion in 2025. Key players include Alma, Klarna, Scalapay, Clearpay, PayPal, LiftForward, and Younited Credit.
news.summary: A recent report on the Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) market in France has been released, offering insights on the business and investment opportunities within the sector. According to the report, the BNPL payment market in France is projected to see a significant growth, with an expected annual increase of 11.3%. By 2025, the market size is predicted to reach US$12.68 billion. Notably, France's BNPL market showed strong expansion from 2021 to 2024, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 19.2%. This data highlights the promising growth prospects within the BNPL industry in France, making it an attractive market for investors and businesses alike.

news.headline: Palantir stock drops after DoD budget cuts. AI strategy touted despite retreat from all-time highs.
news.summary: Following reaching record highs, Palantir stock saw a decline on February 19 due to anticipated Department of Defense budget reductions. Despite this, supporters highlight the software company's strong artificial intelligence approach. The question arises: Should investors consider buying Palantir stock amidst this focus on AI technology?

news.headline: Paralympics champ Rory Cooper is hailed as the "wizard of wheelchairs."
news.summary: After achieving success in the Paralympics, Rory Cooper has become known as the "wizard of wheelchairs". Cooper, a champion in Paralympic sports, has garnered attention for his innovative work in wheelchair technology. The article mentions his title as the "wizard of wheelchairs" and his previous achievements in sports.

news.headline: Alibaba's stock surges after beating earnings expectations, highlighting strong growth in AI cloud.
news.summary: A prominent tech company in China exceeded financial forecasts in its recent earnings report, with a notable increase in profits. The company highlighted the significant role of artificial intelligence (AI) in driving its growth trajectory, indicating that AI technology is contributing to the company's success. Following the positive earnings release, the stock of the tech giant, Alibaba, experienced a considerable surge in value. This highlights investor confidence in the company's performance and the potential for further growth, especially in its AI cloud services sector.

Japan has 110+ data centers currently, with plans to add 15+ more by 2025 - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A database on Japan's existing and upcoming data center portfolio has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. It covers analysis on 112 current data centers and 47 upcoming ones in locations like Akashi, Chiba, Ginoza, Hokkaido, Kitakyushu, Kobe, Matsue, Nago, Okinawa, Osaka, and Oya. This database provides detailed information on the colocation data centers in the Japanese market.

Endava reports Q2 FY2025 results, showing improved profitability with solid performance. Clients prioritize Gen AI adoption.
news.summary: In London, technology services company Endava plc (NYSE: DAVA) reported its financial results for the three months ending December 31, 2024, marking the second quarter of its 2025 fiscal year. The company highlighted solid performance during this period, with enhanced profitability. Notably, the adoption of Generation AI (Gen AI) is gaining importance among clients. Endava's expertise in this area positions them well to capitalize on this trend. The company emphasizes its commitment to combining top-tier engineering, industry knowledge, and a focus on people to drive success.

news.headline: UK's BNPL market to reach US$38.47 billion in 2025, with major players like Klarna dominating; smaller fintech firms growing rapidly.
news.summary: A report on the Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) business and investment opportunities in the United Kingdom has been released, offering detailed insights. The BNPL payment market in the UK is projected to expand by 12.2% annually, reaching a value of US$38.47 billion by 2025. Significant growth was noted in the UK BNPL market from 2021 to 2024, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) yet to be provided in the report. This data book includes over 75 key performance indicators on BNPL market size, end-use sectors, market share, product analysis, business model, and demographics, with an update as of Q1 2025.

news.headline: "National Heritage Academies marks 10 years of school safety program, focusing on training and empowerment of specialists."
news.summary: The National Heritage Academies program marks a decade of success as it celebrates its 10th anniversary in Grand Rapids, Michigan. On February 20, 2025, the program highlights the importance of safety in a successful school environment. Ensuring children feel safe is crucial as it contributes to their overall well-being and development. This milestone emphasizes the program's commitment to creating a secure and nurturing educational setting for its students.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: Chinese want to get some money out of China

Innergex had a successful Q4 2024, securing 560MW in British Columbia and reaching commercial operation of 330MW wind farm in Wyoming. Financially, Q4 2024 saw Adjusted EBITDA Proportionate reach $210.0 million, up by 13%. Additionally, Free Cash Flow per Share for the year ended December 31, 2024, was at $1.06. For 2025, targets include Adjusted EBITDA Proportionate of $825-$875 million and Free Cash Flow per share of $0.75-$0.95. In the fiscal year 2024, the company's Adjusted EBITDA reached $709.7 million, up by 3% compared to the previous year. Financial highlights include Revenues and Production Tax Credits at $1,047.2 million for the year ended December 31, 2024, representing a 1% increase compared to last year. Long-term plans focus on growth, particularly in Canada and the US renewable energy markets.
news.summary: Innergex Renewable Energy Inc. reported its Q4 2024 Strategic Execution, where they secured 560 MW in BC Hydro's call for power in British Columbia, reached commercial operation of the 330 MW Boswell Springs wind farm in Wyoming, and advanced five projects totaling 180 MW to the construction phase. They also strengthened their financial position with $450 million in financings. For Q4 2024, the company's Adjusted EBITDA Proportionate reached $210.0 million, up 13% compared to Q4 2023, and Free Cash Flow per Share was $1.06 for the year ended December 31, 2024. They set 2025 targets with Adjusted EBITDA Proportionate to be $825.0 million to $875.0 million and Free Cash Flow per share to be $0.75 to $0.95. In the financial year of 2024, Revenues and Production Tax Credits were up 1% to $1,047.2 million compared to the previous year, and Adjusted EBITDA Proportionate reached $760.6 million. The company's CEO, Michel Letellier, expressed satisfaction with the company's progress and commitment to delivering results, highlighting their financial achievements and growth prospects.

Natural Grocers® introduces 8 new organic raw Tepache & Kombucha flavors at affordable prices in stores. #OrganicGrocery #HealthyLiving
news.summary: Natural Grocers®, the largest family-operated organic and natural grocery retailer in America, has recently introduced a new line of private-label probiotic-rich fermented beverages in eight delicious flavors. These bubbly drinks are now available in stores at an Always Affordable PriceSM in Lakewood, Colorado. The launch was officially announced on February 20, 2025.

Ascot plans for private placement to fund mine development & restart operations, aiming to raise $20 million.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global economy is projected to grow by 4.2% in 2021, following a 3.5% contraction in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. Emerging market and developing economies are expected to grow by 6% this year, while advanced economies are forecasted to grow by 5.6%. Additionally, global trade volume is predicted to increase by 8.4% in 2021, after a 5.3% decline in the previous year. However, these positive trends are overshadowed by significant risks, including the uneven distribution of vaccines, rising debt levels, and potential financial vulnerabilities. Policymakers are urged to address these challenges to ensure a sustainable and inclusive recovery.

news.headline: Bessent: We have the first call with China counterpart tomorrow (A.M.)
Dana Inc. sees $40M EBITDA growth & $300M cost savings in 2024; $10.3B sales, $57M net loss. 2025 targets announced.
news.summary: Dana Incorporated reported a total sales of $10.3 billion in 2024, down $271 million from the previous year, with a net loss of $57 million compared to a net income of $38 million. Adjusted net income was $136 million, reflecting a $14 million increase from the previous year, and adjusted EBITDA was $885 million, up $40 million from the previous year. The company's free cash flow increased to $70 million in 2024, compared to a use of $25 million in 2023. Dana aims for a 10% increase in adjusted EBITDA and a $155 million increase in free cash flow in 2025, targeting adjusted EBITDA of $925 to $1,025 million. The company is pushing cost-saving actions with $175 million planned for 2025 to drive improved margins and free cash flow. A conference call will be held on February 20 to discuss the full-year results. Dana focuses on sustainable progress through propulsion and energy-management solutions, operating in over 30 countries with 39,000 employees globally.

news.headline: Supremex reported Q4 revenue of $69.1M, envelope segment revenue $48.8M, net earnings $5.8M, and adjusted EBITDA $12.9M.
news.summary: Supremex Inc. reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ended December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter, the company saw total revenue of $69.1 million, down from $72.3 million in 2023. Net earnings were $5.8 million, significantly up from $0.7 million in the previous year, resulting in earnings per share of $0.23. Adjusted EBITDA amounted to $12.9 million, showing an increase from the previous year. For the full year, total revenue reached $281.0 million, a decrease from $302.2 million in 2023. The company announced a quarterly dividend of $0.05 per common share. CEO Stewart Emerson highlighted profitability gains and market improvements, emphasizing strategies for 2025 to enhance efficiency and generate cost savings. The Envelope segment revenue was $48.8 million in Q4, while Packaging & Specialty Products revenue was $20.3 million. Adjusted EBITDA margins improved compared to the previous year. Overall, Supremex remains focused on creating shareholder value with a strong balance sheet and cash flow generation.

news.headline: Wayfair shows positive year-over-year growth: $3.1B Q4 net revenue, 21.4M active customers, $1.4B cash, $128M net loss.
news.summary: Wayfair Inc. reported its Q4 2024 financial results with net revenue totaling $3.1 billion and 21.4 million active customers. The U.S. net revenue increased by $30 million, reaching $2.7 billion, while international net revenue decreased to $381 million. Gross profit was $941 million, with a net loss of $128 million and Non-GAAP Adjusted EBITDA of $96 million. For the full year 2024, total net revenue was $11.9 billion, with a net loss of $492 million and Non-GAAP Adjusted EBITDA of $453 million. Active customers decreased by 4.5% year over year, with LTM net revenue per active customer at $555. Orders per customer were at 1.85 for Q4 2024. Repeat customers placed 79.4% of total orders delivered, and average order value was $290.52.4% of total orders were placed via mobile devices in Q4 2024. The detailed financial statements, balance sheets, and consolidated statements of operations can be found in the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Drilling Tools International Corp. expects strong 2024 financial performance, with revenue hitting high-end guidance, adjusted EBITDA near midpoint, adjusted net income surpassing guidance, and adjusted free cash flow doubling from the prior year. CEO Wayne Prejean praises Q4 team execution despite industry challenges. Q4 and full year 2024 earnings call set for March 14, 2025 at 10:00 a.m. ET. (Words: 70)
news.summary: Drilling Tools International Corp. announced its estimated 2024 full year financial outlook, with revenue expected to be at the high end of previously disclosed guidance, adjusted EBITDA near the midpoint, adjusted net income above the high end, and adjusted free cash flow more than double the prior year period. The CEO, Wayne Prejean, expressed satisfaction with the company's performance amidst industry challenges and highlighted successful integration of acquisitions. The company will release its fourth quarter and full year 2024 financial results on March 14, 2025, followed by a conference call accessible by phone or webcast.

news.headline: Tripadvisor, Inc. released Q4 & full year 2024 earnings. Conference call scheduled for 8:30 a.m. ET on Feb. 20, 2025. Read at ir.tripadvisor.com.
news.summary: In Needham, Massachusetts on February 20, 2025, Tripadvisor, Inc. (NASDAQ: TRIP) released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The earnings press release can be accessed on ir.tripadvisor.com and the SEC's website at www.sec.gov. A conference call is scheduled for February 20, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET to further discuss these results. The live webcast and replay of the call will be available for the public to view. Further information on this news can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: In an announcement made on February 20, 2025, Allied Gold Corporation (TSX: AAUC) (OTCQX: AAUCF) shared its operational projections and future prospects for the year. The update includes revisions to the company's Mineral Reserves and Mineral Resources. Notable highlights from this release include details on the Company's operational mines.

news.headline: AS Tallink Grupp presents Q4 & 12 months 2024 results in investor webinar on 20 Feb 2025. Management Board shares insights.
news.summary: AS Tallink Grupp hosted an investor webinar on February 20, 2025, during which Paavo Nõgene, the Chairman of the Management Board, along with Management Board members Harri Hanschmidt and Margus Schults, presented the financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company expressed gratitude to all participants for their involvement in the event.

news.headline: VALORANT included in HERO ESPORTS ACL, Asia's top multi-title esports tournament lineup with 6 game titles.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Shanghai, the HERO ESPORTS Asian Champions League (ACL) disclosed the inclusion of VALORANT in its debut lineup. This esports tournament, organized by Hero Esports, is one of Asia's top multi-title competitions. Prior to this, ACL had revealed six game titles, including Dota 2.

news.headline: Heimar hf. acquiring Exeter Hotel Properties from Tryggvagata ehf with sellers being MF2 hs. and Laxamýri ehf.
news.summary: Heimar hf. has recently entered into a deal to purchase the entirety of shares in Tryggvagata ehf. The acquisition involves the sale from MF2 hs. and Laxamýri ehf., constituting a significant transaction in the company's operations.

news.headline: GMS Inc. to release Q3 results on March 6, 2025, before NYSE opens. Conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time.
news.summary: Tucker, Georgia - GMS Inc., traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol GMS, a prominent distributor of building products in North America, revealed plans to disclose its financial outcomes for the fiscal Q3 concluded on January 31, 2025, before the NYSE opening on March 6, 2025. The event will include a conference call at 8:30 a.m. EST on the same day, where financials will be analyzed, recent developments discussed, and a Q&A session conducted.

news.headline: Builders FirstSource (NYSE: BLDR) reports Q4 net sales of $3.8 billion, 8.0% decrease due to lower core sales, offsets with acquisitions. Gross margin decreased by 300 bps. Provide 2025 financial outlook.
news.summary: In Irving, Texas, Builders FirstSource, Inc. released its financial results for Q4 and the full year ending on December 31, 2024. The company reported net sales of $3.8 billion for Q4, marking an 8.0% decrease. This decline was primarily attributed to lower core organic sales and commodity deflation, partially offset by acquisitions and an extra selling day. Additionally, the gross margin for the quarter decreased by 300 basis points year-over-year.

news.headline: Cushman & Wakefield (NYSE: CWK) reports strong financial results for Q4 and full year 2024 - highlights include solid leasing revenue, robust capital markets growth, and improved free cash flow. Optimistic outlook for 2025.
news.summary: Cushman & Wakefield (NYSE: CWK) announced its financial outcomes for the last quarter and entire fiscal year of 2024 in Chicago. Michelle MacKay, the CEO, highlighted the company's successes, noting solid Leasing revenue for the quarter, the most substantial Capital markets expansion since Q1 2022, and notable year-on-year enhancement in free cash flow. The organization starts 2025 with optimism, ready for further growth.

news.summary: Melbourne, Australia and Indianapolis – On February 20, 2025, Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited (ASX: TLX, Nasdaq: TLX) released its financial performance for the year ending on December 31, 2024. The results are presented in Australian Dollars (AU$) unless specified differently.

news.headline: Discover effective ways to evaluate Speech Recognition models with key metrics like Word Error Rate and proper noun accuracy for reliable assessments.

news.headline: New Arkham Exchange has no maker fees & 95% off taker fees, driven by ARKM balance & trades, promising top trading terms.
news.summary: A newly launched exchange, Arkham Exchange, has introduced a unique fee structure. The platform is offering zero maker fees and slashing taker fees by up to 95%. These reduced fees are determined based on ARKM balance and trading volume, providing users with competitive trading conditions.
